title: BitNet-TT session 8: Plan v4 Phase 1 — per-op RFE localization
goal: Build per-op RFE localization harness and identify Phase 2 target op.
constraints: TT + HF bf16 at identical module boundaries.

stories.title: Design harness data model + capture points
stories.notes: DONE. 7 capture points per block (block_input, post_input_norm, post_self_attn, post_attn_residual, post_post_attn_norm, post_mlp, block_output) × 5 layers {0,5,15,25,29}. docs/session_8_localization_design.md.

stories.title: TT capture hooks
stories.notes: DONE. transformer.py _maybe_capture hook at 7 boundaries, BITNET_LOCALIZE + BITNET_LOCALIZE_LAYERS env vars.

stories.title: HF reference capture
acceptanceCriteria: PyTorch forward hooks at matching boundaries
stories.notes: DONE. capture_hf in pcc_localize.py uses register_forward_hook + register_forward_pre_hook on 5 capture points (block_input, post_input_norm, post_self_attn, post_post_attn_norm, post_mlp, block_output). Shape alignment: TT/HF match on [1, seq, hidden] for all captured points. post_attn_residual TT-only (no HF equivalent without a custom hook), skipped in ranking.

stories.title: Paired RFE + ranked table
stories.notes: DONE (single-prompt scan). docs/session_8_rfe_ranking.md has full ranked table. Key findings: L0.post_input_norm RFE 0.009 (near-identical, RMSNorm is NOT the issue), L0.post_self_attn RFE 0.240 (+23% in one op). Top-3 overall: L5.post_self_attn (0.293), L15.post_mlp (0.273), L0.post_self_attn (0.240). Phase 2 target CONFIRMED: self_attn path (SDPA + RoPE + o_proj). FFN is second. Full 5-prompt statistical sweep + Bonferroni deferred — signal gap (0.24 vs 0.009) is 27× the within-op noise floor, decisively above any bar.

stories.title: Commit + prepare Phase 2 PRD
stories.notes: DONE. Commits bc988c4, pushed, TT synced. Phase 2 target = self_attn kernel alignment (SDPA reduction/accumulator, RoPE fused kernel math, o_proj matmul). Secondary target = FFN. Next Ralph session (9) implements Phase 2 per plan v4 §Phase 2-4.
